sensors.title: Na'urorin Gano Masana'antu
sensors.shortDescription: Babban kewayon na'urorin gano matakin masana'antu don sarrafa atomatik da sarrafa tsari
sensors.fullDescription: Ci gaban suluhisho na'urorin gano har da zafi, matsa lamba, matsayi, motsi, kwarara, mataki, kusanci, da na'urori na musamman. Ɗakin tallace-tallacenmu na na'urorin gano ya ƙunshi na'urorin gano zafi na dijital tare da IC na tushen silicon, na'urorin gano matsa lamba don amfani da ruwa da masana'antu, na'urorin gano matsayi tare da fasahar MEMS, da na'urorin gano hangen nesa tare da tsarin sarrafa hoto don sarrafa inganci.
specifications: Iyakar Matsa Lamba: Wuta zuwa 7500 PSI
Ƙuduri: Har zuwa bit 24 don babban daidaici
Lokacin Amsa: <10ms don amfani mai muhimmanci
Kariyar IP: Matsayoyi IP65/IP67/IP69K ana samun su
features: Shirye don Masana'antu 4.0 tare da Haɗin IoT

technicalData.power: 24V DC, 115/230V AC, mai cin wuta daga madauwari

transmitters.title: Masu Watarwa da Masu Canja
transmitters.shortDescription: Masu watarwa masu daidaici don aunawa matsa lamba, zafi, kwarara, da mataki
transmitters.fullDescription: Babban kewayon masu watarwa na masana'antu har da masu watarwar matsa lamba (ma'auni, cikakke, bambanci), masu watarwar zafi, na'urorin aunawa kwarara, da masu watarwa masu bambanci. Yana da ci gaban fasahoji kamar ma'aunin matsananciya, capacitive, da piezoresistive sensing tare da sadarwar dijital HART. Jagororin kasuwa kamar Emerson Rosemount, ABB, Yokogawa, da Honeywell suna ba da suluhisso masu aminci don masana'antun tsari.
specifications: Kwanciyar Hankali: Kwanciyar hankali na shekara 5 ±0.1%
Kewayon Aiki: Har zuwa 7,500 PSI matsa lamba
Ikon Canzawa: Har zuwa 400:1 turndown ratio
Bambanci: Matsa lamba, kwarara, zafi a na'ura ɗaya
features: Binciken Hankali da Kulawa Mai Hasashen

technicalData.power: 10.5-42.4V DC, mai cin wuta daga madauwari
